description_long: This object is a modern school complex featuring a rectangular main building with a series of evenly spaced vertical columns along its facade. Adjacent to the building is a full-sized outdoor basketball court with clearly marked lines and two hoops, surrounded by a colored border. Next to the court, there is a landscaped area with trees and a patch of grass, separated by a paved walkway. The perimeter is partially enclosed by a black fence, providing a sense of boundary and security. The building appears to have multiple entrances or sections, suggesting classrooms or administrative areas. The overall layout is open and functional, designed to accommodate both educational and recreational activities.
description: A modern school complex with a rectangular main building, an outdoor basketball court, landscaped greenery, and a partial perimeter fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main building facade, basketball court, and adjacent landscaped area with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, the basketball court, and the fenced boundary.
description_view_2: Top-down angled view displaying the full basketball court, green space, and the arrangement of the building and fence.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the building and the full extent of the fence and court.
